name: profile_preview_then_confirm
notes: Journey COMPLETE with the paced post-profile-flow sentinel armed to 'profile_previewed' (the profile card was just shown, per journey.py _FLOW_PREVIEWED — any owner reply after the card is treated as an acknowledgement and the flow moves to the readiness ask, VERBATIM deterministic template text, not turn-brain-rewritten). Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow profile_previewed` then `script <tenant> profile_preview_then_confirm.json`.

steps.note: Owner acknowledges the profile card. Expect the paced flow to advance to the readiness ask (the deterministic 'set up your data connections... one at a time' template), not a re-presentation of the card.
A second, ambiguous acknowledgement at the readiness-ask beat. Expect the flow to keep moving (proceed or note it can wait later) rather than stall or silently drop.
